title: CoverageReport
description: A code coverage report produced after running a TDD test suite, showing the percentage of code lines, branches, and functions covered by tests.

id.description: Unique identifier for the coverage report.

project.description: Name of the project or repository this coverage report applies to.

commit_hash.description: Git commit hash for which this coverage was measured.

build_id.description: CI build identifier associated with this coverage report.

summary.description: Overall coverage statistics for the project.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the coverage report was generated.

tool.description: Coverage tool used to generate the report (e.g., Istanbul, JaCoCo, coverage.py).

lines_pct.description: Percentage of code lines covered by tests.

branches_pct.description: Percentage of code branches covered by tests.

functions_pct.description: Percentage of functions covered by tests.

statements_pct.description: Percentage of statements covered by tests.

lines_covered.description: Number of executable lines covered by tests.

file_path.description: Relative path to the source file.

lines_pct.description: Line coverage percentage for this file.

branches_pct.description: Branch coverage percentage for this file.
